features: Bow-Knot Design: These small gift boxes for jewellery design with a beautiful blue bow on the top of the lid. Decorate your jewellery gift box more elegant, Send your well-prepared gifts to your family and friends.
Premium Material: The gift packaging boxes are made of high quality thick cardboards and with a satin ribbon on the lids. Not easy to deform, scratch proof and no fading. Reusable and recycled.

Padded Inserts: The gift boxes for presents is equipped with flexible removable soft foam pads to display jewellery in a elegant way. Multiple grooves are designed, earrings, necklaces, rings, bracelets can be hold at the same time.

Size Detail: Each white jewellery box measure 9x7x3cm/3.6x2.8x1.2inch (LxWxH). Ideal for storage small jewellery, keyring, handicrafts, chocolate, etc. Perfect packaging for a small and delicate gift.
Multi-Use: This stylish paper jewelry gift boxes will make your gift stand out on Mother’s Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, Suitable for put in birthday gifts, wedding gifts, baby showers gifts.
